case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. DIANA Y SU ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: 1) COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2) 2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 17156063) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100026811), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED APR-04-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-05-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT SU, DIANA Y
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17156063) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO RIVERSIDE COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SU, DIANA Y

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $241.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 17156063) AS TO DEFENDANT SU, DIANA Y
DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 17156063) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SU, DIANA Y $2,018.69 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,259.69, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SU, DIANA Y DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-11-2017
